summary: Set 027 Session 2: extended Python e2e scenarios. Added four new scenario test files (cancel/restore mid-set, force-close with guard + forensic + final-session tests, worktree discovery via real git worktrees, multiset sequential boundary hygiene). Extended fixtures.py with cancel_set/restore_set/make_sibling_worktree/make_additional_set helpers and drive_close_session(force=True). Cross-provider verification ($0.48, gpt-5-4, 3 rounds) surfaced 2 Major + 5 Minor findings; all addressed. Full suite 437 passed + 1 skipped.

reason.specifics: Session 3 builds the @vscode/test-electron tree-provider harness in TypeScript. Same orchestrator engine; TypeScript is within Claude Code's strong zone and the Python fixture generator from Sessions 1-2 is already in place.
